title: Maximum Number of Groups Getting Fresh Donuts
titleCn: 得到新鲜甜甜圈的最多组数

testcases.input: batchSize = 3, groups = [1,2,3,4,5,6] Output: 4 Explanation: You can arrange the groups as [6,2,4,5,1,3]. Then the 1st, 2nd, 4th, and 6th groups will be happy.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: You can arrange the groups as [6,2,4,5,1,3]. Then the 1st, 2nd, 4th, and 6th groups will be happy.
